01 — About

Engineering the AI layer of the enterprise

Forward-deployed engineer and team lead translating cutting-edge AI into measurable business outcomes for insurance, healthcare, and financial services leaders.

I'm an AI Solutions and Forward Deployed Engineering leader with 6+ years driving enterprise digital transformation through Generative AI, Large Language Models, Agentic AI, and intelligent automation.

I've architected customer-facing AI solutions, led cross-functional teams, and accelerated Fortune 500 deployments end-to-end — from discovery and architecture through to launch and adoption.

My toolkit spans LLM fine-tuning, RAG pipelines, prompt engineering, SaaS implementation, cloud architecture on AWS & GCP, and the stakeholder management that turns ambitious ideas into shipped systems.

  • 60% automation lift across enterprise workflows via LLM agents & RAG.
  • $750K annual savings from standardized AI accelerators & playbooks.
  • Team of 5 engineers led across a $10M+ enterprise portfolio.
  • +15% account renewals through product-influencing customer work.
  • SOC 2, HIPAA & enterprise governance compliant delivery.
02 — Experience

Where I've shipped

Six years across pre-sales engineering, enterprise consulting, and AI forward-deployment — promoted four times at Ushur.

Manager, AI Solution Acceleration & Forward Deployment
Dec 2025 — Present
Ushur · AI-Powered CX Automation · Santa Clara, CA
  • Lead AI Solution Acceleration for Ushur's flagship enterprise customers, owning forward-deployed engagements that operationalize Generative AI, LLMs, and Agentic AI workflows across insurance, healthcare, and financial services.
  • Drove a 60% lift in process automation and 85% reduction in manual intervention by architecting LLM-powered conversational agents, RAG pipelines, and intelligent document workflows fine-tuned on customer data.
  • Manage and mentor a cross-functional team of 5 forward-deployed engineers and consultants, improving delivery velocity by 35% across a $10M+ portfolio.
  • Partner with Product, Engineering, Sales, and CS to shape the AI roadmap — influencing 4 GA feature launches and driving 15% growth in enterprise renewals.
Senior Technical Consultant
Apr 2025 — Jan 2026
  • Owned end-to-end delivery for mid-market and enterprise accounts — discovery, technical design, build, and go-live — cutting onboarding by 30% with 98% CSAT.
  • Built and deployed production GenAI applications (LLM orchestration, prompt engineering, RAG) integrated with Salesforce, ServiceNow, and core banking/insurance systems via REST APIs.
  • Standardized implementation playbooks and reusable AI accelerators — 20% faster delivery, $750K/yr in operational savings.
Technical Consultant
Jun 2024 — Apr 2025
  • Designed and delivered secure, compliant CX Automation environments for Fortune 500 clients, aligning to SOC 2, HIPAA, and enterprise governance frameworks.
  • Led customer-facing workshops & architecture sessions; integrated Ushur with SaaS systems (Salesforce, Workday) and bespoke apps, lifting feature adoption 30% within 90 days.
Associate Technical Consultant
Oct 2023 — Jun 2024
  • Drove client engagements — requirements discovery, solution presentations, and PoC builds — for managers, architects, and C-suite stakeholders.
  • Resolved complex technical roadblocks and translated business requirements into scalable implementations; promoted within 8 months.
Graduate Technical Consultant
Dec 2021 — May 2023
Miller Center · Santa Clara, CA
  • Performed due diligence on 8 social enterprises, using SQL scripting and data modeling to build executive dashboards surfacing financial and impact insights for stakeholders.
  • Designed a custom community portal on Salesforce Digital Experience Cloud — 25% productivity gain, 40% boost in customer satisfaction.
Solutions Engineer (Pre-Sales & Post-Sales)
Jun 2019 — Jul 2021
Oracle · Bangalore, India
  • Delivered product demos, technical consultations, and RFP responses using Oracle's cloud suite + open-source tech to address critical needs across 80+ accounts.
  • Engineered custom applications modernizing legacy workflows and CMS — streamlined processes across 10 departments and cut paperwork by 75%.
  • Partnered with AEs on deal qualification, sales strategy, and solution scoping — directly contributing to pipeline growth and win rates.
  • Oracle Spot Award — drove 12% revenue growth in a quarter, authored 80 internal enablement assets, sustained 100% CSAT.
